## What

## Checklist

- [ ] `make gate` is green locally
- [ ] Every commit has a DCO sign-off (`git commit -s`)
- [ ] Every commit is cryptographically signed (SSH key or gitsign)
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] Docs updated for user-visible changes (name them), or "no user-visible surface"
